summary_en: TOKYO BASE authorized repurchase of up to 1.5M shares (3.4% of outstanding) for max ¥500M via market purchases through June 30, 2026, to enhance shareholder returns and capital efficiency.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief:
On May 18, 2026, TOKYO BASE's Board of Directors resolved to acquire treasury stock pursuant to Article 165(3) of the Companies Act (read in conjunction with Article 156). The buyback is authorized under the company's articles of incorporation and aims to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency by considering future investment plans, financial position, and capital structure.

The repurchase will target up to 1.5 million ordinary shares, representing 3.4% of issued shares excluding treasury stock (against 43.96M shares outstanding as of the announcement date). The aggregate purchase price is capped at ¥500 million. Acquisition will occur via market purchase under a dedicated treasury stock acquisition contract, with purchases to be executed between May 19 and June 30, 2026. As of the announcement date, the company held 13 treasury shares.
